mainTitle: Seedance 1.0: Advanced AI Video Generation Model

features.title: Professional 1080p Video Generation
features.description: Seedance 1.0 delivers stunning 1080p video quality with smooth motion, rich details, and cinematic aesthetics. Experience professional-grade video creation that transforms your ideas into high-resolution visual masterpieces with unprecedented clarity and detail.

subPoints.title: High Definition Excellence
subPoints.text: Generate crisp 1080p resolution videos with exceptional detail and clarity, perfect for professional content creation and commercial applications.

subPoints.title: Cinematic Aesthetics
subPoints.text: Advanced rendering creates smooth motion and rich visual details that deliver cinematic quality results with professional-grade aesthetics.

features.title: Native Multi-Shot Storytelling
features.description: Revolutionary multi-shot narrative generation with visual consistency across shot transitions. Seedance 1.0 excels at creating cohesive video stories with seamless scene changes, maintaining character and environmental continuity throughout complex narratives.

subPoints.title: Visual Consistency
subPoints.text: Maintain perfect visual coherence across multiple shots with advanced character recognition and environmental consistency algorithms.

subPoints.title: Narrative Flow
subPoints.text: Create complex multi-scene stories with smooth transitions and logical progression, enabling sophisticated storytelling capabilities.

features.title: Diverse Style Versatility
features.description: From photorealism to cyberpunk, illustration to animation - Seedance 1.0 supports an incredible range of visual styles. Create content that matches any aesthetic vision, from ultra-realistic footage to stylized artistic expressions with precise style control.

subPoints.title: Photorealistic Rendering
subPoints.text: Generate ultra-realistic videos that are virtually indistinguishable from real footage, with natural lighting and authentic textures.

subPoints.title: Artistic Styles
subPoints.text: Express creativity through cyberpunk aesthetics, illustration styles, animation looks, and other artistic interpretations with precise control.

features.title: Precise Complex Prompt Understanding
features.description: Seedance 1.0 excels at interpreting complex natural language instructions with remarkable accuracy. Describe intricate scenes, character interactions, and creative concepts in detail - the AI understands and executes your vision with exceptional precision.

subPoints.title: Natural Language Mastery
subPoints.text: Advanced language understanding interprets complex creative briefs with nuanced comprehension of artistic intent and technical specifications.

subPoints.title: Creative Direction
subPoints.text: Translate detailed descriptions into accurate visual representations, understanding context, emotion, and artistic direction with minimal iteration.

features.title: Multi-Agent Interactions & Camera Control
features.description: Control character interactions and sophisticated camera movements with precision. Seedance 1.0 enables complex multi-character scenes with natural interactions, while offering professional-grade camera control for dynamic cinematography.
features.imageAlt: Seedance 1.0's multi-agent and camera control features

subPoints.title: Character Interactions
subPoints.text: Orchestrate natural multi-character scenes with realistic body language, facial expressions, and social dynamics that feel authentic and engaging.

subPoints.title: Dynamic Camera Work
subPoints.text: Achieve professional cinematography with smooth camera movements, tracking shots, and dynamic perspectives that enhance storytelling impact.

features.title: Wide Dynamic Range & Subtle Expression
features.description: Capture both subtle expressions and active scenes with Seedance 1.0's wide dynamic range capabilities. From intimate character moments to high-energy action sequences, the model excels at rendering the full spectrum of human emotion and movement.

subPoints.title: Subtle Expression Capture
subPoints.text: Render delicate facial expressions, micro-movements, and nuanced emotional states with remarkable sensitivity and authenticity.

subPoints.title: Action Scene Excellence
subPoints.text: Generate dynamic action sequences with fluid motion, realistic physics, and compelling visual energy that maintains clarity and impact.
